description: Generate a diffusion models paper tree
prompt: 帮我画一个扩散模型（Diffusion Models）的论文发展树，从Score Matching的早期工作到最新的DALL-E 3和Stable Diffusion。
expectations: Output file paper_tree_diffusion.html exists in /mnt/user-data/outputs/
HTML file is self-contained (no external script dependencies beyond Google Fonts and inline JS)
Contains at least 25 papers
Contains at least 5 column tracks
Has a Core Trunk column with the main DDPM/DDIM/Score lineage
Ho et al. 2020 DDPM paper is marked as star:true
At least one paper has sota:true badge
All paper URLs are real arXiv links (not placeholder XXX values)
The COLS array matches the number of visible column tracks in the header
The ROWS array correctly maps paper eras to year labels
Filter buttons in sidebar correspond to defined CATS categories
Drag-to-pan works (viewport mousedown handler present in JS)
Detail panel click handler is present and opens correctly
No two papers share the same (col, era) combination

description: Generate a reinforcement learning paper tree
prompt: 给我画一个强化学习（Reinforcement Learning）的论文树，从Q-Learning和Policy Gradient到PPO、SAC、AlphaGo、ChatGPT的RLHF。
expectations: Output file paper_tree_rl.html exists in /mnt/user-data/outputs/
Contains at least 25 papers
Covers classical RL (Q-learning, REINFORCE), deep RL (DQN, A3C), and modern alignment (PPO, RLHF)
DQN (Mnih et al. 2015) is marked as star:true
PPO or RLHF paper is present
AlphaGo or AlphaZero is present
Timeline covers at least 1992 to 2022
Columns reflect thematic separation (e.g., Value-based, Policy-based, Model-based, Alignment)
All paper URLs point to real papers

description: Generate a narrow/focused paper tree for a specific model family
prompt: 画一个专注于BERT和它的后代模型（BERT family）的论文树，包括所有重要的BERT变体和微调技术。
expectations: Output file paper_tree_bert.html or similar exists in /mnt/user-data/outputs/
Contains at least 15 papers
BERT (Devlin 2018) is present as the trunk paper
Includes variants like RoBERTa, ALBERT, DistilBERT, DeBERTa
Includes fine-tuning methods like LoRA, Adapter tuning, or Prompt tuning
Timeline is narrower (2018-2024)
star:true applied to BERT and at least 2-3 highly influential variants
Columns reflect meaningful distinctions (e.g., Architecture variants, Efficiency, Multilingual, Fine-tuning)
